description: Complete university application handling — eligibility check, document preparation, and submission to your chosen Russian university.
End-to-end student visa processing support including form filling, document checklist, and embassy appointment guidance.
Notarization, attestation, and translation of all required academic and personal documents for university admission.
Official university invitation letter processing required for student visa application to the Russian embassy.
Personal reception at the Russian airport by our representative and safe transfer to your hostel or accommodation.
Pre-arrival booking of verified hostel or student accommodation near your university campus.
Ongoing support throughout your first year — orientation, local SIM card, bank account setup, and 24/7 helpline.
